'''vazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:omnidimensionally|omnidimensionally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:omnidimensionally|omnidimensionally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vazate|vazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vazatesher|vazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazatesherĂ«m|vazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazatero|vazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vazateshĂ«|vazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazateshĂ«m|vazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazatero|gokivazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivazateshĂ«|gokivazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazateshĂ«m|gokivazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govazankerom|govazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govazankeshĂ«|govazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazankeshĂ«m|govazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govazankeya|govazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazaterom|vazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazatemu|vazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vazateya|vazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazaterom|gokivazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazatemu|gokivazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivazateya|gokivazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vazazate|vazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vazazatesher|vazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazazatesherĂ«m|vazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazazatero|vazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vazazateshĂ«|vazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazazateshĂ«m|vazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazazatero|gokivazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivazazateshĂ«|gokivazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazazateshĂ«m|gokivazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govazazankerom|govazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govazazankeshĂ«|govazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govazazankeshĂ«m|govazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govazazankeya|govazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vazazaterom|vazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vazazatemu|vazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vazazateya|vazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivazazaterom|gokivazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivazazatemu|gokivazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivazazateya|gokivazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠte|vĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠtesher|vĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠtero|vĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠtero|gokivĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠzĂŠnkerom|govĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠzĂŠnkeya|govĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠterom|vĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠtemu|vĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠzĂŠteya|vĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠterom|gokivĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠzĂŠteya|gokivĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafzafte|vafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafzaftesher|vafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzaftesherĂ«m|vafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafzaftero|vafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafzafteshĂ«|vafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzafteshĂ«m|vafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafzaftero|gokivafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafzafteshĂ«|gokivafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafzafteshĂ«m|gokivafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafzafnkerom|govafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafzafnkeshĂ«|govafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafzafnkeshĂ«m|govafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafzafnkeya|govafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafzafterom|vafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafzaftemu|vafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafzafteya|vafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafzafterom|gokivafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafzaftemu|gokivafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafzafteya|gokivafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
